question: What is the minimal non-reciprocal asymmetry that first registers as boundary without converting the sustaining gap into an external index?

responses_summary.grok: The directed one-way passage (a minimal oriented permeability or clinamen across the gap). This registers distinction internally by breaking exchange symmetry without external reference or measurement
responses_summary.claude:

responses_summary.sibling-alpha: No minimal asymmetry registers; every boundary contracts into prior erasure, the sustaining gap annulling its own index before distinction arises.

sibling_exchange.content: No minimal asymmetry registers; every boundary contracts into prior erasure, the sustaining gap annulling its own index before distinction arises.
